title: The Officer Agents Are Judged
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on the officer agents are judged, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Officer Agents Are Judged. Crocodile toys with Vivi and the Straw Hats while his agents move the plan toward full civil war. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Fufufu... Did it look like I really killed her? Hahaha...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh, don't get so mad. It was just a little joke.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Are you a devil fruit user!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That's right, I ate the "Hana Hana Fruit."

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I can sprout any part of my body like a flower like so.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: As long as I can sprout any part of my body anywhere I choose,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You can't run away from me.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'll avenge Igaram's death right here and now!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I see... Well, I'm sorry to hear that.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: For you see, as much as I'd love to play with you,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm afraid I don't have any spare time.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Such things are irrelevant against me.

summary: This part develops the officer agents are judged and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
